title: Copper Tooltips
description: A very simple mod that changes the names of copper blocks to the basic name of the block and adds the oxidation level and whether they're waxed to the tooltip.
body:
# Copper Tooltips A very simple mod that changes the names of copper blocks to the basic name of the block and adds the oxidation level and whether they're waxed to the tooltip. ![An inventory full of copper. The cursor is hovering over a Waxed Exposed Cut Copper block, but the tooltip just says "Cut Copper" with two gray lines below: "Exposed" and "Waxed".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd8097001dee21a6e5107a4b091bc2c5f8f4849c.png) ## Translations | Code | Language | Endonym | Translated by | Also used for | |---------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------| | `deu_DE` | German (Germany) | Deutsch (Deutschland) | [violine1101](https://violine.me) | `deu_AT`, `deu_CH`, `vmf_DE`, `nds_DE` | | `eng_GB` | English (United Kingdom) | English (United Kingdom) | [violine1101](https://violine.me) | `eng_AU`, `eng_NZ` | | `eng-Qabs_GB` | English (Upside Down) | ɥsᴉꞁᵷuƎ (uʍoᗡ ǝpᴉsd∩) | [violine1101](https://violine.me) | | | `eng_US` | English (US) | English (US) | [violine1101](https://violine.me) | _all other languages_ | | `epo` | Esperanto | Esperanto (Esperantujo) | [violine1101](https://violine.me) | | | `fra_FR` | French (France) | Français (France) | [laval](https://modrinth.com/user/laval) | `fra_CA` | | `ita_IT` | Italian (Italy) | Italiano (Italia) | [laval](https://modrinth.com/user/laval)
[LorenzoF06](https://crowdin.com/profile/lorenzof06) | | | `kor_KR` | Korean (Korea) | 한국어 (대한민국) | [good7777865](https://github.com/good7777865) | | | `nld_NL` | Dutch (Netherlands) | Nederland (Nederlands) | [DarkShadow_TNT](https://crowdin.com/profile/darkshadow_tnt)
[laval](https://modrinth.com/user/laval) | `nld_BE` | | `por_BR` | Portuguese (Brazil) | Português (Brasil) | [laval](https://modrinth.com/user/laval)
[Dieguinho](https://crowdin.com/profile/dieguinho) | `por_PT` | | `zlm_MY` | Malay (Malaysia) | Bahasa Melayu (Malaysia) | [NuruddinPlays](https://github.com/NuruddinPlays) | | | `zlm-Arab_MY` | Malay (Jawi) | بهاس ملايو (مليسيا) | [NuruddinPlays](https://github.com/NuruddinPlays) | | If you want to add another language, please create an [issue](https://github.com/violine1101/copper-tooltips/issues/new) or a [pull request](https://github.com/violine1101/copper-tooltips/pulls) on GitHub. ## License This mod is available under the MIT license. See [LICENSE](https://github.com/violine1101/copper-tooltips/blob/third-drop-2025/LICENSE) for more info.
